creator: shivaram.u@quadstor.com
text:
Hi Johann,

I guess System Administration/ISP is apt among the available
categories. There isnt any for Data Storage. If such a category does
get created in the future then we can move it there.

Thanks for your patience,

Regards,
Shivaram

On Wed, Sep 14, 2011 at 3:56 PM, Johann Kois <jkois@freebsd.org> wrote:
> On Wednesday, 14 September 2011 12:00:24 Shivaram Upadhyayula wrote:
>> The following reply was made to PR www/160699; it has been noted by GNAT=
S.
>>
>> From: Shivaram Upadhyayula <shivaram.u@quadstor.com>
>> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org, shivaram.u@quadstor.com
>> Cc:
>> Subject: Re: www/160699: Inclusion of QUADSstor Systems under
>> "Commercial Vendors" -> Software
>> Date: Wed, 14 Sep 2011 15:06:07 +0530
>>
>> =A0Hi jkois,
>>
>> =A0Quadstor systems isn't an ISP provider. We provide software products
>> =A0towards data storage. Our primary product is a storage virtualization
>> =A0product for FreeBSD (Thin provisioning, Data deduplication etc).
>> =A0Formerly we provided VTL software on FreeBSD. We do not provide servi=
ces
>> =A0such as web hosting etc.
>>
>> =A0Apologies if my PR description is misleading. But we are hoping to ma=
ke
>> =A0the list of Commercial Vendors -> Software.
>>
>> =A0Regards,
>> =A0Shivaram
>
> Hello,
>
> okay. =A0I get your point now and I will move your entry to "Software". =
=A0As I
> see it, possible categories would be "Miscellaneous" or "System Administr=
ation
> / ISP". Which one would you prefer?
>
> Regards.
>
> jkois
>
>
>
> --
> =A0Johann Kois
> =A0jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
> =A0FreeBSD Documentation Project
> =A0FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
>



--=20
Reduce Storage expenditure with QUADStor Storage Virtualization
http://www.quadstor.com
